name: WW Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the remaining wet ingredients: applesauce, egg whites or Ener-G replacements, carrots, pineapple, and vanilla.
3. Mix all ingredients together until just combined. If using an electric mixer, this will help create a light cake texture.
4. Pour the batter into a Pam-sprayed 8 or 9 inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
6. The cake is very moist and delicious without frosting. If desired, you can mix cream cheese, vanilla, and powdered sugar to create a frosting and spread it over the cooled cake.
